title: Kanichukulangara Devi Temple
tagline: Kanichukulangara Devi Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Kanichukulangara Temple (referred to as Kanichukulangara Bhagwathy Temple) is a famous temple of the Hindu mother goddess Bhagawathi.
overview.description: Kanichukulangara Temple (referred to as Kanichukulangara Bhagwathy Temple) is a famous temple of the Hindu mother goddess Bhagawathi. The temple is located near Cherthala in Alappuzha district of Kerala in India. The main festival is celebrated on the day of "Thiruvonam" in the Malayalam month "Kumbham". The temple is famous for 'Chikkara', 'Pongala', 'Thooka Chadu' and Fire Works .

topPlaces.description: Mararikulam is a village in India, in the district of Alappuzha, Kerala state. Previously, it was a constituency in the Kerala Legislative Assembly, represented by legislators including T. M. Thomas Isaac, V. S. Achuthanandan, Vijayamma.

topPlaces.name: Arthunkal
topPlaces.description: Arthunkal is a coastal town and a major pilgrim centre in the south Indian state of Kerala. It is 40 kilometre south of Cochin city and 21 kilometre north of Alleppey town.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kanichukulangara Devi Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kanichukulangara Devi Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kanichukulangara Devi Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (59 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (38 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kanichukulangara Devi Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kanichukulangara Devi Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kanichukulangara Devi Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Kanichukulangara Devi Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kanichukulangara Devi Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mararikkulam North, Kanjikuzhi (Alappuzha), Mararikulam North, Cherthala South, Marari Beach.
